mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_member" (username, password, name, email, role, gym_id, birth) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{role}, #{gymId}, #{birth})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM "h_member" WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND UPPER(role) = 'OWNER' LIMIT 1
SELECT username, name, gym_id, role FROM "h_member" WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND UPPER(role) = 'MEMBER' ORDER BY name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_refresh_token" (username, refresh_token, expiry_date) VALUES (#{username}, #{refreshToken}, #{expiryDate}) ON CONFLICT (username) DO UPDATE SET refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate}
